ab: makasu’i kung tayhuk pakaba’an biru mayabu sawni la.
en: I was late for school this morning.

ab: musa kung i pakaba’an biru ga, yamngiya kung maras su kabang mu la.
ch: 去學校的時候，我忘了帶書包。
en: When I was going to school, I forgot to bring my backpack.

ab: ini kung aras ninanu na yayuwaw.
en: I didn't bring anything with me.

ab: miru sami ga, gamalu kung matayux biru ki bays mu miru.
ch: 上課的時候，我和同學一起看課本。
en: During class, I and my classmates read the textbook together.

ab: pasapung ga, kasiyukan kung nya inpit ru i’ing ku galuw mu miru.
ch: 考試的時候，同學借我筆和橡皮擦。
en: During the exam, a classmate lent me a pen and an eraser.

ab: kyalun kung ni pasaba biru maha, “sa’utux la ga kayabu hazi matuli, laxiy i kasu’i la ki!”
ch: 老師跟我說：「下次早點起床，不要再遲到了!」
en: The teacher told me, "Wake up earlier next time and don't be late again!"
